intro: Relaxing puzzles with cute anime girls.
description:
Solve captivating puzzles featuring images of beautiful anime-style girls. With each image you complete, you'll unlock new ones, and the gradually increasing difficulty makes solving the puzzle a fascinating challenge. Intuitive touch controls create the feeling that you're actually touching every detail.

Soft and relaxing music will help you immerse yourself in the atmosphere, and after solving the puzzle, you can examine the image closely and admire every detail.

Features:

• Convenient one-handed play.
• Stylish anime images.
• Full immersion thanks to touch controls.
• Gradually increasing difficulty.
• Relaxing music.
